title: hedeoma irvingii
intro: Hedeoma irvingii, also known as Irving's pennyroyal, is a perennial plant native to the western United States. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and colds. Its essential oils have been found to possess antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including relieving nausea and reducing fever. Hedeoma irvingii can be prepared into teas, tinctures, and infusions for consumption, as well as used in topical applications for skin issues and insect bites.
